module.name: boost
build-commands: ./b2 stage --prefix="${FLATPAK_DEST}" --with-python --with-iostreams --with-random variant=release threading=multi link=shared toolset=gcc  debug-symbols=off
./b2 install --prefix="${FLATPAK_DEST}" --with-python --with-iostreams --with-random variant=release  threading=multi link=shared toolset=gcc debug-symbols=off
